final:
// // This module selects between two 8-bit inputs, A_i and B_i. When the selection input S_i is HIGH (0), the output Y_o will be equal to A_i; when S_i is LOW (1), the output Y_o will be equal to B_i.
module top_module(
  (* intersynth_conntype = "Byte" *)
  input[7:0] A_i,
  (* intersynth_conntype = "Byte" *)
  input[7:0] B_i,
  (* intersynth_conntype = "Bit" *)
  input S_i,
  (* intersynth_conntype = "Byte" *)
  output[7:0] Y_o
);assign     Y_o = S_i ? B_i : A_i;

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module selects between two 8-bit inputs, A_i and B_i. When the selection input S_i is HIGH (0), the output Y_o will be equal to A_i; when S_i is LOW (1), the output Y_o will be equal to B_i.
